Beneficiaries measure 21 Num 8 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay not equal to missing. Equals 1 if beneficiary was attributed to a practice for Per Capita Costs for All Attributed Beneficiaries measure.
ATTRIB_STEP Basis for attribution Step in which beneficiary was attributed to practice: Step 1 or 2 22 Num 3 Populated only for records with Inpatient_stay not equal to missing. Equals 1 if beneficiary attributed to practice in Step 1, equals 2 if beneficiary attributed to practice
